name: Crab Rangoon
content: A crispy wonton filled with cream cheese, crab, and green onions.

name: Fish and chips
content: A classic dish of fried fish and french fries.

reviews.review: A must-try for any food lover!

name: Sushi
content: A Japanese dish of vinegared rice topped with seafood, vegetables, or eggs.

name: Lobster roll
content: A New England sandwich made with lobster meat, mayonnaise, and celery on a hot dog bun.

reviews.review: The best lobster roll I've ever had!
A must-try for any seafood lover!

name: Fish tacos
content: A Mexican dish of fried fish, cabbage, pico de gallo, and avocado in a corn tortilla.

name: Paella
content: A Spanish rice dish cooked with seafood, chicken, sausage, and vegetables.

name: Tuna melt
content: A grilled sandwich made with tuna salad, cheese, and bread.

name: Fish curry
content: A South Asian dish of fish cooked in a curry sauce.

reviews.review: A must-try for any curry lover!
